exercises.title: Standards Landscape
exercises.description: Map the current PQC/hybrid standards landscape.
hints: Include FIPS, SP, drafts, and RFCs

exercises.title: Compliance Mapping
exercises.description: Map your organization to applicable standards.

exercises.title: CNSA 2.0 Analysis
exercises.description: Analyze NSA CNSA 2.0 requirements and timeline.
hints: Different requirements for different use cases

exercises.title: Standards Tracking
exercises.description: Create a process for tracking evolving PQC standards.
hints: Include NIST, IETF, and industry groups
